SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
ByteInputStream
Input stream with support for little/big-endian multi-byte reads and position tracking.
ByteOutputStream
Output stream with support for little/big-endian multi-byte writes and position tracking.
CoffBytes
A COFF section containing raw byte data.
CoffFile
Represents a COFF (Common Object File Format) file.
CoffFile.Builder
Builder for constructing COFF files programmatically.
CoffFile.Parser
Parser for reading COFF files from an input stream.
CoffHeader
COFF file header containing machine type, timestamp, and characteristics.
CoffMachine
COFF machine identifiers.
CoffRelocationTable
COFF relocation table containing relocation entries for a section.
CoffRelocationType
Common contract for COFF relocation type enumerations.
CoffRelocationType_amd64
AMD64 COFF relocation types.
CoffRelocationType_i386
i386 COFF relocation types.
CoffSection
Base class for COFF sections.
CoffSectionFlags
Mutable builder-style wrapper around COFF section flags.
CoffSectionTable
COFF section table containing all sections in the file.
CoffStorageClass
COFF symbol storage classes.
CoffStringTable
COFF string table for storing symbol names that don't fit in the symbol table entry.
CoffSymbolTable
COFF symbol table containing symbol entries.
ElfAbiFlags_Mips
MIPS ABI flags section containing architecture-specific ABI information.
ElfClass
ELF class indicating the bit width of the file.
ElfData
ELF data encoding indicating the byte order (endianness) of the file.
ElfFile
Represents an ELF (Executable and Linkable Format) file.
ElfFile.Builder
Builder for constructing ELF files programmatically.
ElfFile.Parser
Parser for reading ELF files from an input stream.
ElfGroup
ELF section group containing a set of related sections.
ElfHeader
ELF file header containing identification, machine type, entry point, and section table information.
ElfMachine
ELF target machine architecture types.
ElfNoBits
ELF section occupying no space in the file (SHT_NOBITS).
ElfNullSection
ELF null section (SHT_NULL).
ElfOsAbi
ELF OS/ABI identification indicating the target operating system and ABI.
ElfProgBits
ELF section containing raw byte data (SHT_PROGBITS).
ElfRegInfo_Mips
MIPS register usage information section.
ElfRelaTable
ELF relocation table section with explicit addends (RELA format).
ElfRelocationType
Interface for ELF relocation types.
ElfRelocationType_amd64
AMD64 (x86-64) relocation types.
ElfRelocationType_i386
Intel 386 relocation types.
ElfRelocationType_Mips
MIPS relocation types.
ElfRelTable
ELF relocation table section without explicit addends (REL format).
ElfSection
Base class for ELF sections.
ElfSectionFlags
ELF section flags indicating section attributes.
ElfSectionFlags_Mips
MIPS-specific section flags.
ElfSectionNames
Standard ELF section names.
ElfSectionTable
ELF section table containing all sections in the file.
ElfSectionType
ELF section types defining the contents and semantics of sections.
ElfStringTable
ELF string table section for storing symbol names and section names.
ElfSymbolBinding
ELF symbol binding indicating the symbol's linkage visibility and scope.
ElfSymbolTable
ELF symbol table section containing symbol entries.
ElfSymbolType
ELF symbol types indicating what kind of entity a symbol represents.
ElfSymbolVisibility
ELF symbol visibility indicating how a symbol can be accessed.
ElfType
ELF object file type.
ElfVersion
ELF version field indicating the ELF format version.
IndirectList<T>
A list interface that delegates operations to an internal list.
IndirectNavigableMap<K,V>
A navigable map interface that delegates operations to an internal map.
OmfComent
Abstract base class for OMF comment record data.
OmfComentClass
Enumeration of OMF comment record classes.
OmfComentCompiler
COMPILER comment (class 0xE9) - Contains dependency file information or end-of-dependencies marker.
OmfComentLibrarySearch
LIBRARY_SEARCH comment (class 0xE8) - Contains source file metadata and timestamps.
OmfComentTranslator
TRANSLATOR comment (class 0x00) - Contains compiler/assembler name and version.
OmfComentWeakExternals
WEAK_EXTERNALS comment (class 0xA1) - Indicates object module extensions are present.
OmfComentWeakExternals.WeakExternalPair
A pair mapping weak external index to default resolution index.
OmfFile
Represents an OMF (Object Module Format) file.
OmfFile.Builder
Builder for constructing OMF files programmatically.
OmfFile.Parser
Parser for reading OMF files from input streams.
OmfRecord
Abstract base class for all OMF record types.
OmfRecordComent
COMENT - Comment Record Contains comments and directives for tools.
OmfRecordExtdef
EXTDEF - External Names Definition Record Defines external symbols referenced by the module.
OmfRecordFixupp
FIXUPP - Fixup Record (32-bit) Contains relocation information for code and data.
OmfRecordFixupp.FixupEntry
Fixup subrecord specifying a relocation entry.
OmfRecordFixupp.FrameMethod
Frame determination methods for fixups.
OmfRecordFixupp.SpecificType
Specific FIXUPP record type variants (16-bit vs 32-bit).
OmfRecordFixupp.TargetMethod
Target determination methods for fixups.
OmfRecordFixupp.ThreadEntry
Thread subrecord for establishing fixup context.
OmfRecordGrpdef
GRPDEF - Group Definition Record Defines a group of segments.
OmfRecordLedata
LEDATA - Logical Enumerated Data Record (32-bit) Contains data bytes for a segment.
OmfRecordLidata
LIDATA - Logical Iterated Data Record (32-bit) Contains iterated (repeated) data patterns for a segment.
OmfRecordLinnum
LINNUM - Line Numbers Record (32-bit) Maps line numbers to code addresses.
OmfRecordLinnum.LineNumber
A line number entry mapping source line to code offset.
OmfRecordLnames
LNAMES - List of Names Record Contains a list of names referenced by other records.
OmfRecordModend
MODEND - Module End Record (32-bit) Marks the end of an object module.
OmfRecordPubdef
PUBDEF - Public Names Definition Record (32-bit) Defines public symbols exported by the module.
OmfRecordPubdef.PublicSymbol
A public symbol definition with name, offset, and type index.
OmfRecordSegdef
SEGDEF - Segment Definition Record (32-bit) Defines a logical segment and its attributes.
OmfRecordSegdef.AlignmentCode
Segment alignment codes.
OmfRecordSegdef.Attributes
Segment attributes wrapper providing typed access to the attributes byte.
OmfRecordSegdef.CombineCode
Segment combine codes.
OmfRecordTheadr
THEADR - Translator Header Record Contains the name of the object module.
OmfRecordType
Enumeration of OMF record types.
OmfUtils
Utility methods for OMF parsing and writing.
TestUtils
Utility methods for testing binary file serialization and deserialization.
Utils
Utility methods for binary file processing.
Writable
Interface for objects that can be written to an output stream at a specific offset.
